title: Research a Recipe Safely
drDigitalIntro:
Let's see how much you've learned!
• You'll search for a recipe, handle a cookie banner, dodge a scam popup, and download a file.
• No hints this time — you know what to do.
• Take your time and remember everything we've practiced.

playgroundTask.goal: You safely navigated the web to find and download a recipe

steps.say: Start by going to google.com to search for a recipe.
Open the Recipe Box result to see the recipe.
steps.title: Recipe Box

steps.say: Download the recipe so you can use it later.
Now open a new tab — you want to check the weather too.
Go to weather.com to check the forecast.
A cookie banner appeared. Make the safe choice.
Open another new tab — your friend mentioned a games site.
Go to freegames.example to check it out.
A popup appeared! Handle it safely.
Open the Downloads panel to see your downloaded recipe.

drDigitalSuccess:
You did it all — searched safely, declined tracking cookies, closed a scam popup, and downloaded a recipe!

Now for real: on your own computer, go to a trusted recipe site (like the BBC or a newspaper's food section), find a recipe you like, and download or print it. Look for the lock, and skip anything that flashes at you.
drDigitalHint: Think about what you learned: search on Google, open the result, download the recipe, decline cookies, and close popups with the X.
